main.description: Fulfillment policy: only the requester's own DIDs may bid on and fulfill this RFP. Carries downstream through subcontracting chains — all sub-bidders must also be operated by the root requester.

requesterDid.description: ATProto DID of the root requester. Only bidders whose operatorDid matches this value may fulfill.

signatures.description: badge.blue attestations over this policy. Must include the requester's inline signature, attached at creation.
